data.title: Freight Ship Cancellations Surge as US -China Trade War Escalates
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, April 18, 2025-Freight carriers have begun canceling sailings from China to the United States as booking volumes plummet amid a deepening trade war, highlighting growing pressure on global supply chains and shipping routes. At least 80 canceled sailings from China have been recorded, according to logistics firm HLS Group. The cuts follow sharp […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/freight-ship-cancellations-surge-as-us-china-trade-war-escalates

data.title: Planet Evening News
BANK price exceeds $0.033, and the current allocation value of TGE top-level participating users is about $67
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market data, Lorenzo Protocol token BANK rose after the end of Binance Wallet's new round of TGE, and the price exceeded $0.033. According to the allocation rules, users who participated in this round of TGE at the maximum level received about 2028 BANKs, with a total value of about $67 at the current price.

data.title: MoonPay writes to Congress to support CSBS, calling for stablecoin bill to ensure equal status of state regulation
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News MoonPay CEO Ivan Soto-Wright wrote a letter to the U.S. Congress today, supporting the U.S. Association of State Bank Supervisors (CSBS)'s amendment proposal on equal regulatory power between state and federal stablecoin issuers in the GENIUS Act and the STABLE Act. He emphasized that the current provisions of the current bill are overly biased towards the federal path and may weaken the competitiveness of state-licensed issuers. Call on Congress to amend the law to maintain competition, fairness and consumer protection. (Crypto in America)

data.title: BitMart launches Lorenzo Protocol (BANK)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch Lorenzo Protocol (BANK) at 19:00 (Eastern Time Zone 8) on April 18, and the BANK/USDT trading pair will be launched.
Lorenzo is an institutional-level asset management platform that issues income tokens supported by multiple underlying strategies. Its two flagship products are stBTC, a BTC liquidity staking token driven by Babylon staking income, and enzoBTC, a wrapped BTC that includes Lorenzo native income and on-chain liquidity mining income. BANK is the governance token of the Lorenzo protocol.

data.title: Bitget will list Lorenzo Protocol (BANK)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget will launch Lorenzo Protocol (BANK). 
Trading opening time: 21:00 on April 18, 2025; withdrawal opening time: 22:00 on April 19, 2025.

data.title: BNB Chain’s $100 million incentive plan is fully upgraded to directly buy coins to support ecological development
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BNB Chain's 100 million US dollar plan, after 3 weeks of trialing the "reward liquidity when listed", now launches the "direct token purchase" mechanism based on community feedback to help the development of ecological projects in a more comprehensive and direct way.
The plan targets BNB Chain native assets or cross-chain assets. All track projects that meet the following on-chain data and security requirements have the opportunity to obtain at least a single purchase of 100,000 US dollars.
For transaction-driven assets: market value ≥ 1 million US dollars; average daily traders ≥ 300 people; average daily trading volume ≥ 200,000 US dollars
For TVL-driven assets: total locked value (TVL) ≥ 20 million US dollars; the core evaluation standard is the growth of the protocol TVL
Security requirements: the top 10 external accounts (EOA) hold no more than 10% of the total supply (excluding CEX and CZ related wallets); the project must complete contract verification or pass a security audit on BscScan, as well as pass multiple risk assessments.
The BNB Chain Foundation will select targets from the qualified project pool and purchase with the foundation wallet address. The purchase time is random and will be announced through the official account after the transaction is completed. 
BNB Chain Foundation acquisition address 0x511DfE9E248c887E32ca8bF9d1cb76f101965060
The upgraded 100 million US dollar incentive plan reflects BNB Chain's firm commitment to continue to support builders and create long-term value for the ecosystem during the market ups and downs.
